description: ACTN3 Muscle Performance Marker - 'The Sprint Gene', common on commercial ancestry chips.
MTHFR Folate Metabolism Marker - Highly common on commercial genotyping chips.
COMT 'Warrior/Worrier' Marker - Informative for stress response and cognitive traits.
TP53 Pro72Arg Marker - Common on chips, informative for latitude-based selection.
OCA2 Pigmentation Marker - Informative for global ancestry and skin/eye color.
SLC24A4 Pigmentation Marker - Informative for global ancestry patterns.
SLC24A4 Pigmentation Marker - Common chip marker for ancestry.
High in SAS, very low in EAS; strongly separates South and East Asian ancestries.
High in EAS, low in SAS; discriminates East Asian from South Asian populations.
Elevated in SAS, minimal in EAS; informative for SAS vs EAS differentiation.
Near fixation in EAS, absent in SAS; key marker for East vs South Asia.
Fixed in SAS, null in EAS; powerful tiebreaker for South Asian ancestry.
High in EUR, low in MENA; sharply separates European from Middle Eastern ancestry.

Fixed in MENA, near absent in EUR; highlights Middle Eastern genomic heritage.
Extreme EUR-MENA frequency contrast; classic marker for European ancestry.
High in AMR, absent in EAS; separates Native American from East Asian ancestry.

High in AMR, rare in EAS; informative for distinguishing American ancestry.

Near fixation in AFR, extremely low elsewhere; primary African ancestry AIM.
High across Europe, low in non-European groups; general European differentiation.
Frequent in SAS, rare in most other groups; broad South Asian identifier.
Predominant in EAS, showing some OCE affinity; general East Asian AIM.
High in MENA, shared with some SAS; distinguishes Middle Eastern ancestry.
